question.text: What percentage of investors by value must accept a winding up proposal for an AIF set up as a trust?

answer.text: Two-thirds of the investors by value

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The winding up proposal is accepted at a meeting of the unitholders by 75% of the investors by the value of their investment. **The Trap:** Two-thirds (66.67%) is for strategy change, not winding up. 75% is the higher threshold for winding up. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** An AIF can also be wound up if SEBI directs in the interests of investors.
